description: Axiom is a cloud data platform for logs, traces, metrics, events, and related observability and analytics workflows. It lets users ingest, query, analyze, and manage event data, dashboards, monitors, and related resources.
summary: Axiom exposes a REST API at `https://app.axiom.co/api`, a hosted MCP server at `https://mcp.axiom.co/mcp`, and the `axiom` CLI; docs describe token-based auth for API/CLI and OAuth-based remote MCP auth.
